canvas.description: Base app canvas color for primary surfaces.

canvas-soft.description: Soft app canvas color for lightly tinted surfaces.

canvas-muted.description: Muted app canvas color for low-emphasis surfaces.

canvas-strong.description: Strong app canvas color for high-emphasis surfaces.

canvas-inverse.description: Base inverse app canvas color for surfaces on dark or inverted contexts.

canvas-inverse-soft.description: Soft inverse app canvas color for lightly tinted surfaces in inverse contexts.

canvas-inverse-muted.description: Muted inverse app canvas color for low-emphasis surfaces in inverse contexts.

canvas-inverse-strong.description: Strong inverse app canvas color for high-emphasis surfaces in inverse contexts.

ink.description: Base app ink color for text and icons on neutral or light canvases.

ink-soft.description: Soft app ink color for lower-emphasis text and icons.

ink-muted.description: Muted app ink color for subtle or secondary text and icons.

ink-inverse.description: Base inverse app ink color for text and icons on inverse or dark canvases.

ink-inverse-soft.description: Soft inverse app ink color for lower-emphasis text and icons on inverse canvases.

ink-inverse-muted.description: Muted inverse app ink color for subtle text and icons on inverse canvases.

border.description: Base app border color for outlines, strokes, and dividers.

border-soft.description: Soft app border color for low-emphasis outlines and dividers.

border-muted.description: Muted app border color for subtle outlines and dividers.

border-strong.description: Strong app border color for high-emphasis outlines and dividers.

border-inverse.description: Base inverse app border color for outlines and dividers on inverse canvases.

border-inverse-soft.description: Soft inverse app border color for low-emphasis outlines on inverse canvases.

border-inverse-muted.description: Muted inverse app border color for subtle outlines on inverse canvases.

border-inverse-strong.description: Strong inverse app border color for high-emphasis outlines on inverse canvases.
